title: Citi Predicts $5.5 Trillion Tokenized Securities Market by 2030
summary: Citi forecasts the tokenized securities market will reach $5.5 trillion by 2030, driven by stablecoins and onchain U.S. Treasury bills. This includes $1 trillion in onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion in tokenized stocks.
body:
Citi, a major global financial institution, has released a report predicting that the market for tokenized securities will grow to $5.5 trillion by 2030. The report highlights that stablecoins will generate significant demand for onchain U.S. Treasury bills and tokenized stocks.

According to Citi, stablecoins alone will generate a demand for up to $1 trillion worth of onchain U.S. Treasury bills and $2.6 trillion for tokenized stocks. This growth is expected to be fueled by the increasing adoption of blockchain technology in traditional financial markets, making securities more accessible and efficient to trade.

This prediction underscores the potential of blockchain technology to revolutionize traditional financial markets. For everyday investors, this could mean easier access to a wider range of securities, potentially lower fees, and more efficient trading processes. It also signals a shift towards greater integration of digital assets into mainstream finance.

Investors and financial institutions should watch for regulatory developments and technological advancements in blockchain that could accelerate this growth. As the market matures, more traditional financial products may become available in tokenized form, offering new opportunities for diversification and investment.

Read more → https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/06/01/citi-predicts-the-tokenized-securities-market-will-grow-to-usd5-5-trillion-by-2030
